compiled_state.title: Write RED unit tests for AcliClient.set_issue_property and _direct_rest_put
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Story DD Coverage
This task is responsible for satisfying the following story done definitions:
- DD4: unit tests mock the PUT and assert credential header injection

## TDD Requirement
Write failing unit tests for AcliClient.set_issue_property() and AcliClient._direct_rest_put() before any implementation exists. Tests must fail with AttributeError (method does not exist). Tests mock urllib.request.urlopen to assert correct HTTP method, URL path, and Authorization header injection.

## Test Approach (Given / When / Then)
- Given an AcliClient with jira_url, user, and api_token; When set_issue_property(jira_key, "dso.file_impact", [{"path":"src/foo.py"}]) is called; Then urllib.request.urlopen is called with a Request targeting /rest/api/3/issue/{jira_key}/properties/dso.file_impact with Authorization: Basic header.
- Given a 4xx HTTP response from urlopen; When _direct_rest_put is called; Then it raises urllib.error.HTTPError (not silently swallowed).

## File Impact
- CREATE: tests/scripts/test_acli_integration_set_issue_property.py
- MODIFY: .test-index (add RED marker for acli-integration.py)

## Implementation Notes
- Test file: tests/scripts/test_acli_integration_set_issue_property.py
- Fuzzy-match check: "aclintegrationpy" substring of "testaclintegrationsetssueproperty" -- NO, the normalized source basename "acliintegrationpy" must be a substring of the normalized test basename. "test_acli_integration_set_issue_property.py" normalizes to "testaclintegrationsetissueproperty". "acliintegration" IS a substring → fuzzy-match compatible, no .test-index entry needed for the test-to-source mapping.
- But .test-index still needs a RED marker for the new test function name.
- Tests use importlib to load acli-integration.py (filename has hyphens, same as other test files in this directory).
- Mock urllib.request.urlopen using unittest.mock.patch('urllib.request.urlopen').
- AcliClient has self.jira_url, self.user, self.api_token (already in __init__).
- Expected URL for set_issue_property: f"{jira_url.rstrip('/')}/rest/api/3/issue/{jira_key}/properties/{property_key}"
- Expected Authorization header: "Basic " + base64(user:api_token)
- Test 4 functions minimum: path, header, json body, http error propagation.
- Tests must be marked to fail with RED zone tolerance in .test-index.

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes for existing tests (exit 0 or RED zone tolerates new failures)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_acli_integration_set_issue_property.py -x 2>&1 | grep -E "FAILED|ERROR" | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 == 0)}'
- [ ] Test file tests/scripts/test_acli_integration_set_issue_property.py exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test_acli_integration_set_issue_property.py
- [ ] Test file contains at least 4 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^def test_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test_acli_integration_set_issue_property.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] Tests are RED before implementation: pytest reports 4+ failures
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_acli_integration_set_issue_property.py 2>&1 | grep -E "FAILED|AttributeError" | head -1 | grep -q .
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker [test_set_issue_property_calls_put_on_correct_path] for plugins/dso/scripts/acli-integration.py
  Verify: grep "test_set_issue_property_calls_put_on_correct_path" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] ruff check passes for new test file
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check tests/scripts/test_acli_integration_set_issue_property.py
